body:
Lessons Mama Never Taught Me is a non-fiction literary work.
The names and identifying details of the individuals mentioned
in this book have been changed in order to protect their privacy.

Copyright © 2025 Authored by Dr. Karen R. January.

All rights reserved.

Published in the United States by January Media LLC, Illinois.
This publication (content, illustrations, artwork, etc.) may not be
reproduced, distributed or transmitted in any form or by any means,
including photocopying, recording, or other electronic or mechanical

the exception of brief quotations embodied in critical reviews and
certain other noncommercial uses permitted by copyright law.

Second Edition
